commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Not a repair-lane candidate because this external PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof in addition to a code fix on the branch.; Needs attention: The provider-priority regression can route prompts and credentials through an unintended configured provider.; Review finding: [P1] Prefer the default provider before scanning providers — src/agents/configured-provider-fallback.ts:28-35 (sha=034194274340f3d45d951c7d1a1ab7dead5ecd37)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `resolveConfiguredProviderFallback` model-aware and passes `defaultModel` from the model-selection and status-summary call sites.

PR surface: Source +35. Total +35 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction for the PR regression: configure an earlier custom provider and `openai` with the same `gpt-5.5` id, then resolve the default `openai/gpt-5.5`; the new scan returns the earlier provider before checking `openai`. I did not run the test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Not a repair-lane candidate because this external PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof in addition to a code fix on the branch.
